name: Thermal Lance
abilityText: Deal 5 damage. Apply Burn.
flavor: Cuts through plating like a hot wire through wax.

name: Flak Burst
abilityText: Deal 4 damage to each of 3 random targets.
flavor: Spray and pray is a valid doctrine when you have enough barrels.

name: Finisher Torpedo
abilityText: Deal 9 damage. If target below 30% hull, deal 12 extra.
flavor: Locked on the dying embers of a failing reactor.

name: Breach Mark
abilityText: Deal 5 damage. Apply Expose.
flavor: Tag the weak spot. Let the pack finish the job.

name: Salvo Barrage
abilityText: Deal 10 damage. Gain 1 Scrap.
flavor: Every hit leaves debris. Every piece has value.

name: Piercing Beam
abilityText: Deal 14 damage. Ignore 50% of target's Block.
flavor: Phase-shifted photons pass through matter like it isn't there.

name: Arc Coil
abilityText: Deal 6 damage, then 4, then 2 to successive targets.
flavor: Lightning has no loyalty. It simply finds the next conductor.

name: Reactor Spike
abilityText: Take 5 self-damage. Deal 18 damage.
flavor: Overload the reactor. Ask questions later.

name: Rail Line
abilityText: Deal 15 to primary target. Deal 7 to secondary target.
flavor: One slug. Two holes. Zero pity.

name: EMP Nova
abilityText: Deal 8 damage to all enemies. Apply Jam to all.
flavor: The pulse doesn't discriminate. Everything stops.

name: Shatter Beam
abilityText: Deal 18 damage. If target has Block, deal 8 bonus damage.
flavor: Designed for one purpose: breaking things that think they're safe.

name: Void Lance
abilityText: Deal 28 damage. Apply Lock.
flavor: A weapon from beyond the mapped sectors. It does not miss.

name: Charged Shot
abilityText: Deal 14 damage. +4 damage for each turn held in hand.
flavor: Patience is a virtue. Patience with a capacitor is a death sentence.

name: Stellar Annihilator
abilityText: Deal 36 damage. If target has 2+ statuses, deal 12 extra. Exhaust.
flavor: The last thing a capital ship sees before its bridge goes dark.

name: Void Echo
abilityText: Deal damage equal to total damage dealt this combat. Once per game. Exhaust.
flavor: The void remembers every wound you've inflicted. And returns them all at once.

name: Ablative Plating
abilityText: Gain 5 Block. If hit this turn, gain Shielded.
flavor: Each layer burns away to protect the one beneath it.

name: Firewall Bubble
abilityText: Gain Shielded. Draw 1.
flavor: A thin digital membrane between you and catastrophe.

name: Drain Beam
abilityText: Steal 8 Block from enemy.
flavor: Why generate your own shield when you can borrow theirs?

name: Shield Lattice
abilityText: Gain 12 Block. Retain 50% of remaining Block next turn.
flavor: Interlocking energy fields that rebuild as fast as they break.

name: Bulkhead Lock
abilityText: Gain 12 Block. Lose 1 energy next turn.
flavor: Seal the section. Deal with the power drain later.

name: Auto-Repair Module
abilityText: Heal 2 hull each turn for 3 turns.
flavor: Nanobots work slow. But they never stop.

name: Phase Shell
abilityText: Ignore the next attack completely. Draw 1.
flavor: For one heartbeat, you exist slightly outside reality.

name: Leech Shield
abilityText: This turn, gain Block equal to half the damage your weapons deal.
flavor: The best defense is a good offense. Literally.

name: Persistent Barrier
abilityText: Gain 16 Block. Retain up to 10 Block at end of turn.
flavor: Military-grade shielding that doesn't know when to quit.

name: Crash Override
abilityText: If you would take lethal damage this turn, survive with 1 hull instead. Gain 10 Block. Exhaust.
flavor: ERROR: DEATH.EXE — ACCESS DENIED.

name: Afterburn
abilityText: Evade next attack. Gain 1 energy next turn.
flavor: Full thrust, no brakes, no regrets.

name: Barrel Roll
abilityText: Reduce damage from next 2 hits by 3 each.
flavor: Aileron roll. Works in atmosphere. Works in void. Works everywhere.

name: Vector Feint
abilityText: If attacked this turn, gain 6 Block and draw 1.
flavor: Bait the shot. Read the angle. Punish.

name: Drift Turn
abilityText: Next weapon hits twice at −3 damage per hit.
flavor: Slide sideways. Fire twice. Straighten up.

name: Tractor Pulse
abilityText: Apply Lock. Deal 4 damage.
flavor: Grab them. Hold them. Hit them.

name: Anchor Protocol
abilityText: Gain 10 Block. Cannot Evade this turn.
flavor: Plant yourself. Let the armor do the talking.

name: Cloak Burst
abilityText: Become untargetable until your next turn. Discard 1.
flavor: Vanish. Recalculate. Return on your terms.

name: Phantom Strike
abilityText: Become untargetable. Next weapon deals double damage.
flavor: A ghost with a gun. The worst kind.

name: Decoy Drone
abilityText: Deploy drone: Absorbs next 5 damage.
flavor: Looks real enough to take a bullet for you.

name: Oracle Drone
abilityText: Deploy drone: Reveals enemy intent each turn for 2 turns.
flavor: It sees what's coming. Whether you act on it is your problem.

name: Snare Drone
abilityText: Deploy drone: Applies Lock each turn for 2 turns.
flavor: Once it latches on, running is no longer an option.

name: Salvage Drone
abilityText: Deploy drone: Generates 1 Scrap each turn for 3 turns.
flavor: It doesn't fight. It picks up what's left after fighting.

name: EMP Drone
abilityText: Deploy drone: Applies Jam every other turn for 4 turns.
flavor: A persistent migraine for enemy systems.

name: Escort Wing
abilityText: Deploy 2 micro-fighters: each deals 2 damage per turn for 3 turns.
flavor: Two wingmen that never complain and never miss.

name: Kamikaze Drone
abilityText: Deploy drone: 3 damage per turn for 2 turns. On death, deal 10 damage.
flavor: It was always going to end this way. Might as well make it count.

name: Carrier Deploy
abilityText: Deploy Scout Drone and Repair Drone. Each lasts 3 turns.
flavor: Open the bay. Launch everything. Sort it out later.

name: Efficiency Protocol
abilityText: Next 2 cards cost 1 less this turn.
flavor: Optimize. Compress. Execute.

name: System Query
abilityText: Search your deck for a Drone card. Add it to your hand.
flavor: Query: DRONE_TYPE=ANY. Status: LOADED. Deploy when ready.

name: Predator Lock
abilityText: Apply Expose, Lock, and Drone Mark to target.
flavor: Three targeting systems. Zero escape routes.

name: Fleet Commander
abilityText: Summon 2 temporary Gun Drones. Each deals 4 damage per turn for 2 turns.
flavor: One order. Sixteen barrels. Coordinated annihilation.

name: Leviathan Presence
abilityText: All allies gain 2 Block each turn for 3 turns. Draw 2.
flavor: When a Leviathan enters the sector, even pirates hold their fire.

name: Quantum Convergence
abilityText: Duplicate every card you play this turn. Once per game. Exhaust.
flavor: Every timeline collapses into one. And in that one, you played everything twice.

name: Battery Swap
abilityText: Gain 2 energy. Exhaust.
flavor: Hot swap. No downtime. Keep moving.

name: Nanite Pack
abilityText: Heal 5. Remove 1 status. Exhaust.
flavor: Crack the seal. Let the nanites work.

name: Smoke Chaff
abilityText: Gain Evade. Remove Lock from self. Exhaust.
flavor: Silver confetti for a one-ship parade.

name: Spare Drone Kit
abilityText: Summon a 1-turn Gun Drone that deals 4 damage. Exhaust.
flavor: Emergency firepower in a box. Assembly not required.

name: Field Patch
abilityText: Heal 6. Take 2 damage next turn (Repair Debt). Exhaust.
flavor: Quick fix now. The bill comes later.

name: Hard Reboot
abilityText: Remove all statuses from self. Skip next draw phase. Exhaust.
flavor: Turn it off. Turn it on. Pray.

name: Thermal Vent
abilityText: Remove Overcharge from self. Deal 3 damage to all enemies. Exhaust.
flavor: Vent the heat. Let everyone feel it.
